name: Amcor Plc
analysis: AMC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$58.9600. Trade idea: entry A$61.6700, stop A$53.7966, target A$69.8905 (1.04:1) — then trail it.
